description:
## [1.0.4](https://github.com/Seobject/Seobject-patches/compare/v1.0.3...v1.0.4) (2026-07-14)

### Bug Fixes

* correct stable flyout type and identify channels ([0ce521b](https://github.com/Seobject/Seobject-patches/commit/0ce521bd65652f425db0a6e0340fe0560e8c97c4))
* make flyout menu runtime version-aware ([45e067d](https://github.com/Seobject/Seobject-patches/commit/45e067db543adac4e3891a9648f1ee6a1f083cff))
* make stable playlist pinning immediate ([7e4d120](https://github.com/Seobject/Seobject-patches/commit/7e4d12053bee56e93b03c63a2414d4c9a805d49e))
* map stable library adapter and isolate bundle classes ([59ded9e](https://github.com/Seobject/Seobject-patches/commit/59ded9e9f876b739927c1d89bc289702de8eeb05))
